form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 49-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 11 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 24 over 2150m, slow going 6 len behind Lohengreen carrying 58kg at $4.20. The start before that 2nd of 13 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 4 over 2150m, on heavy track; 4 len behind Persuasif with 58kg at $12. Can measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Recent form sound. Comes here off a 49-day let-up. The start before that 2nd of 13 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 4 over 2150m, on heavy track; 4 len behind Persuasif with 58kg at $12. Can measure up.

form.formComment: At debut, 3rd of 8 at Nort-sur-Erdre on April 5 over 2500m, 4 len behind Yokozuna with 54.5kg. Better for that run and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). At debut, 3rd of 8 at Nort-sur-Erdre on April 5 over 2500m, 4 len behind Yokozuna with 54.5kg. Better for that run and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at Angers November 16 over 2000m, a long neck behind Le Futur with 58kg at $8.10. On debut sixth of 11 at Angers November 2 over 2000m, soft track; 10 len behind Avisio with 56kg at $9.20. Strong chance if he can reproduce second up form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at Angers November 16 over 2000m, a long neck behind Le Futur with 58kg at $8.10. On debut sixth of 11 at Angers November 2 over 2000m, soft track; 10 len behind Avisio with 56kg at $9.20. Strong chance if he can reproduce second up form.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 37-day let-up. At the latest run 10th of 13 at Machecoul on March 8 over 2350m, on a slow track; 27 len behind Crystal Bay carrying 58kg. The start before that 3rd of 9 at Machecoul on February 22 over 2350m, on a wet track; 1.3 len behind Le Senonnais with 58kg at $2.80. Has ability and can bounce back.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 13 at Machecoul on March 8 over 2350m, on a slow track; 0.8 len behind Crystal Bay with 56kg. Can measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). At debut, 2nd of 13 at Machecoul on March 8 over 2350m, on a slow track; 0.8 len behind Crystal Bay with 56kg. Can measure up.

form.formComment: Was at a huge quote at debut, ran last of 12 at Saint-Cloud on March 24 over 2400m, 23 len behind Calasita with 56kg at $53. Looking elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Was at a huge quote at debut, ran last of 12 at Saint-Cloud on March 24 over 2400m, 23 len behind Calasita with 56kg at $53. Looking elsewhere.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months ran last of 8 at Machecoul on April 6 over 1650m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Vasumati with 56.5kg. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at this track on November 1 over 1600m, 11 len behind Centauri carrying 53.5kg at $23. Happy to risk.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly by Lawman out of Scoville having her first start. Should kick off on the right note.
